parameters.query: =SELECT store_id, store_name, onboarding_step FROM public.stores WHERE (({{ Number($('Normalize Intake').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Intake').first().json.store_id || 0) }}) OR owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Intake').first().json.chat_id }}') ORDER BY CASE WHEN {{ Number($('Normalize Intake').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Intake').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0 WHEN owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Intake').first().json.chat_id }}' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode: const d = $('Decide Intake').first().json || {}; const store = $('Resolve Store Context').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...d, store_id: d.store_id || store.store_id || null }, binary: $binary }];
const d = $('Decide Intake').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...d, action: d.action === 'apply' ? 'apply' : 'cancel' } }];
